2604.23862.title: Graph Memory Transformer (GMT)
2604.23862.paper_summary: We investigate whether the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) sublayer in a decoder-only transformer can be replaced by an explicit learned memory graph while preserving the surrounding autoregressive architecture. The proposed Graph Memory Transformer (GMT) keeps causal self-attention intact, but replaces the usual per-token FFN transformation with a memory cell that routes token representations over a learned bank of centroids connected by a learned directed transition matrix. In the base GMT v7 instantiation studied here, each of 16 transformer blocks contains 128 centroids, a 128 * 128 edge matrix, gravitational source routing, token-conditioned target selection, and a gated displacement readout. The cell therefore returns movement from an estimated source memory state toward a target memory state, rather than a retrieved value. The resulting model is a fully decoder-only language model with 82.2M trainable parameters and no dense FFN sublayers, compared with a 103.0M-parameter dense GPT-style baseline used in the evaluation. The base v7 model trains stably and exposes centroid usage, transition structure, and source-to-target movement as directly inspectable quantities of the forward computation. It remains behind the larger dense baseline in validation loss and perplexity (3.5995/36.58 vs. 3.2903/26.85), while showing close zero-shot benchmark behavior under the evaluated setting. These results are not intended as a state-of-the-art claim; they support the viability and structural interpretability of replacing dense within-token transformation with graph-mediated memory navigation. Broader scaling, optimized kernels, and more extensive benchmark evaluation are left for subsequent work.
2604.23862.paper_summary_zh: 我們調查了在僅解碼器的Transformer中，前饋網絡（FFN）子層是否可以被明確學習的記憶圖所取代，同時保持周圍的自回歸架構。所提出的圖記憶Transformer（GMT）保持因果自注意力不變，但用一個記憶單元取代了通常的每個標記的FFN變換，該記憶單元通過一個學習的有向轉移矩陣將標記表示路由到一個學習的質心庫。這裡研究的基礎GMT v7實例中，每個16個Transformer塊包含128個質心、一個128 * 128的邊緣矩陣、重力源路由、標記條件目標選擇和一個門控位移讀出。因此，該單元返回從估計的源記憶狀態向目標記憶狀態的運動，而不是檢索的值。與在評估中使用的103.0M參數的密集GPT風格基線相比，所得到的模型是一個完全的僅解碼器語言模型，擁有82.2M可訓練參數，且沒有密集的FFN子層。基礎v7模型穩定訓練，並將質心使用、轉移結構和源到目標的運動暴露為可直接檢查的前向計算量。它在驗證損失和困惑度上仍落後於更大的密集基線（3.5995/36.58對比3.2903/26.85），同時在評估設置下顯示出接近零樣本基準行為。這些結果並不旨在作為最先進的聲明；它們支持用圖介導的記憶導航取代密集的內部標記變換的可行性和結構可解釋性。更廣泛的擴展、優化內核和更廣泛的基準評估將留待後續工作。
2604.23862.author: Nicola Zanarini et.al.
